act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Certified copy of documents.—The Commissioner may, upon an
content:
132. Certified copy of documents.—The Commissioner may, upon an
application made by a taxpayer, issue, on such terms and in such manner as may be
prescribed, a certified copy of the following documents, namely:—
(a) any document or paper submitted by the taxpayer to the VAT officer;
(b) any document submitted to any VAT officer as a proof of
withholding of tax by any withholding entity; or
(c) any other document specified by the Board.

sub_sections.text: any document or paper submitted by the taxpayer to the VAT officer;

any document submitted to any VAT officer as a proof of
withholding of tax by any withholding entity; or
any other document specified by the Board.
